parameters.query: SELECT a.fecha::text AS "Fecha", a.hora::text AS "Hora", a.nombre AS "Nombre", a.servicio AS "Servicio", a.numero AS "Número", a.estado AS "Estado", b.whatsapp_instance, b.owner_number FROM appointments a JOIN businesses b ON b.id = a.business_id WHERE a.fecha = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day' AND a.estado = 'Pendiente' AND b.active = TRUE
